stemHtml: The FANS LOG ON notification phase involves transmitting aircraft information and...

options.a: park stand information to the pre-flight controller for a data-link PDC.
options.b: aircraft position to the ground controller for a data-link taxi clearance.
options.c: aircraft position to request data-link clearance to enter an airspace.
options.d: associated data-link capability, before initiating any data-link communication with ATC.
